Additional Insured status is extended to Worthbridge Realty Management Inc. as required by written contract. Coverage is primary and non-contributory.
Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement.

LOC-001: Corporate Headquarters — 300 Liberty Avenue, Suite 1200, Pittsburgh, PA 15222 (Occupancy: Office)
LOC-002: Main Equipment Yard & Warehouse — 4300 Butler Street, Pittsburgh, PA 15201 (Occupancy: Warehouse)

Evidence of Workers' Compensation coverage is required from all subcontractors prior to commencing work on the project.

The insured's principal operations consist of general contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Entity type: Corporation.
